# Vision

Business OS builds trusted Business Assistants that help small businesses
operate with confidence.

Every small business deserves a great assistant.

## Company Belief

Software should reduce business stress, not create more of it.

## Product Definition

Business OS is not ERP.

Business OS is not accounting software.

Business OS is not payroll software.

Business OS is a platform of Business Assistants.

## Current Product

TimeTrack Pro is the Employee Assistant.

It is responsible for attendance, payroll-ready calculations, work records,
reports, and employee insights.

## Long-Term Direction

Business OS will grow through focused Assistants that remain independently
valuable while sharing the same platform foundation.
